overview: A comprehensive, cinematic ed-tech platform for Arthashastra Classes — a commerce coaching institute in Bhopal. Features a real AI chatbot, live test system with question bank, teacher dashboard, full payment checkout, download center, events system, and premium futuristic UI with glassmorphism and neon glow aesthetics.
features: AI chatbot powered by OpenAI/Claude for student doubt solving and course suggestions
Live test system with question bank, countdown timer, MCQ answer validation, and score analytics
Teacher dashboard for creating tests, uploading materials, and tracking batch performance
Full payment checkout wired to backend purchase flow with success/history pages
Download center for notes, admit cards, hall tickets, and certificates
Events and webinar system with countdown timers and registration
Enhanced student dashboard with attendance ring, progress bars, and AI recommendations
Enhanced admin dashboard with revenue charts and enrollment trends
Cinematic futuristic UI: glassmorphism, OKLCH neon palette, Framer Motion animations
